G

Gets the currently loaded image.

Returns the current value.

Gets a button by its title, searching recursively.

Returns the absolute height including padding and margin.
getAbsoluteWidth() - Method in class microui.core.base.ContentView
Returns the absolute width including padding and margin.

Returns the absolute x-coordinate including margin.
getAbsoluteY() - Method in class microui.core.base.ContentView
Returns the absolute y-coordinate including margin.

Gets the additional debug information.

Gets the horizontal alignment of the text.

Returns the horizontal alignment value.

Returns the horizontal alignment.

Returns the horizontal alignment value.

Returns the vertical alignment.

Returns the vertical alignment value.

Returns the vertical alignment value.

Returns the alpha (transparency) component of this color.

Returns the alpha component.

Returns the current animator mode.
getAnimatorSpeed() - Method in class microui.core.base.ContainerManager
Returns the raw animation speed.

Gets the color of the arrow indicator for sub-menus.

Retrieves text from the clipboard and splits it into an array of lines.

Returns the text content as a string.

Returns the text content as a string.

Gets the auto-resize mode (determines how aggressively text is resized).

Gets the background color of the component.

Returns the background color for containers and main UI areas.
getBackgroundColor() - Method in class microui.core.style.theme.ThemeBlack
Returns the dark background color for containers.
getBackgroundColor() - Method in class microui.core.style.theme.ThemeGlass
Returns an animated looping gradient for the background.
getBackgroundColor() - Method in class microui.core.style.theme.ThemeGray
Returns a medium gray for backgrounds.
getBackgroundColor() - Method in class microui.core.style.theme.ThemeWhite
Returns a very light gray for backgrounds.

Returns the background color of the tooltip.

Returns the blue component of this color.

Returns the blue component.

Returns the color for text displayed on buttons.

Returns the medium gray color for button text.

Returns a light gray color for button text.

Returns a dark gray for button text.
getButtonTextColor() - Method in class microui.core.style.theme.ThemeWhite
Returns pure black for button text.

Gets the cursor color.

Returns the color for text cursor/caret in editable text fields.

Returns a near-white color for text cursor/caret.

Returns a light blue-gray for text cursor/caret.

Returns pure black for text cursor/caret.
getCursorColor() - Method in class microui.core.style.theme.ThemeWhite
Returns a near-black color for text cursor/caret.

Gets the current cursor column (0-based).

Gets the current cursor row (0-based).

Gets the cursor stroke weight (thickness).

Gets the cursor stroke weight (thickness).

Returns the main event detector instance.

Gets the number of digits or returns a default value.

getDigitsStrict() - Method in class microui.core.controller.FullSingleLineTextController
Returns the text content parsed as an integer.

Gets the direction mode for sub-menu placement.
getDoubleClickThreshold() - Method in class microui.event.AbstractEventSystem
Returns the threshold for double-click detection.
getEditableBackgroundColor() - Method in class microui.core.style.theme.AbstractTheme
Returns the background color for editable text fields and areas.
getEditableBackgroundColor() - Method in class microui.core.style.theme.ThemeBlack
Returns medium gray for editable text field backgrounds.
getEditableBackgroundColor() - Method in class microui.core.style.theme.ThemeGlass
Returns a light gray with low opacity for editable backgrounds.
getEditableBackgroundColor() - Method in class microui.core.style.theme.ThemeGray
Returns a very light gray for editable text field backgrounds.
getEditableBackgroundColor() - Method in class microui.core.style.theme.ThemeWhite
Returns pure white for editable text field backgrounds.
getEditableTextColor() - Method in class microui.core.style.theme.AbstractTheme
Returns the color for editable text (text fields, text areas, etc.).
getEditableTextColor() - Method in class microui.core.style.theme.ThemeBlack
Returns pure white for editable text.
getEditableTextColor() - Method in class microui.core.style.theme.ThemeGlass
Returns a very light blue-gray for editable text.
getEditableTextColor() - Method in class microui.core.style.theme.ThemeGray
Returns pure black for editable text.
getEditableTextColor() - Method in class microui.core.style.theme.ThemeWhite
Returns pure black for editable text.
getEnterLongThreshold() - Method in class microui.event.AbstractEventSystem
Returns the threshold for enter-long events (hover duration before trigger).

Returns an unmodifiable view of the entry list.

Gets the font used for rendering the button's text.

Returns the height.

Gets the color used for hover effects.

Gets the color of the hover effect.
getHoverColor() - Method in class microui.core.style.theme.AbstractTheme
Returns the color for hover effects when users mouse over interactive elements.
getHoverColor() - Method in class microui.core.style.theme.ThemeBlack
Returns a semi-transparent light gray for hover effects.
getHoverColor() - Method in class microui.core.style.theme.ThemeGlass
Returns a semi-transparent cyan-blue for hover effects.
getHoverColor() - Method in class microui.core.style.theme.ThemeGray
Returns a medium gray with medium opacity for hover effects.
getHoverColor() - Method in class microui.core.style.theme.ThemeWhite
Returns a semi-transparent light blue for hover effects.
getHoverSpeed() - Method in class microui.component.LabeledCheckBox
Gets the animation speed for hover effects.
getHoverSpeed() - Method in class microui.core.AbstractButton
Gets the animation speed of the hover effect.

Returns the numeric identifier of the element.

Returns the top padding value.

Returns the width including left and right padding.

Returns the x-coordinate including left padding.
getPadY() - Method in class microui.core.base.ContentView
Returns the y-coordinate including top padding.

Returns the primary accent color used for highlights and primary actions.
getPrimaryColor() - Method in class microui.core.style.theme.ThemeBlack
Returns a semi-transparent light gray for primary accents.
getPrimaryColor() - Method in class microui.core.style.theme.ThemeGlass
Returns an animated looping gradient for primary accents.
getPrimaryColor() - Method in class microui.core.style.theme.ThemeGray
Returns a dark gray for primary accents.
getPrimaryColor() - Method in class microui.core.style.theme.ThemeWhite
Returns a medium gray for primary accents.
getPriority() - Method in class microui.core.base.View
Returns the priority of rendering the element.
getProgressColor() - Method in class microui.component.Slider
Gets the fill color of the progress indicator.
getProgressStrokeColor() - Method in class microui.component.Slider
Gets the stroke color (border color) of the progress indicator.
getProgressStrokeWeight() - Method in class microui.component.Slider
Gets the stroke weight (border thickness) of the progress indicator.

Returns the current reaction mode.

Returns the red component of this color.

Returns the red component of the interpolated color.
getRed() - Method in class microui.core.style.Color
Returns the red component.

Returns a string representation of the redo stack for debugging.
getRipplesColor() - Method in class microui.core.AbstractButton
Gets the color of the ripple effects.
getRipplesColor() - Method in class microui.core.style.theme.AbstractTheme
Returns the color for ripple animation effects on click/touch interactions.
getRipplesColor() - Method in class microui.core.style.theme.ThemeBlack
Returns a very transparent gray for ripple animations.
getRipplesColor() - Method in class microui.core.style.theme.ThemeGlass
Returns a very transparent gray-blue for ripple animations.
getRipplesColor() - Method in class microui.core.style.theme.ThemeGray
Returns a light gray with medium opacity for ripple animations.
getRipplesColor() - Method in class microui.core.style.theme.ThemeWhite
Returns pure white for ripple animations.

Returns the starting row index.
getRows() - Method in class microui.layout.GridLayout
Returns the number of rows in the grid.
getRowSpan() - Method in class microui.layout.GridLayoutParams
Returns the number of rows spanned.
getSelectColor() - Method in class microui.core.style.theme.AbstractTheme
Returns the color for selected items or highlighted selections.
getSelectColor() - Method in class microui.core.style.theme.ThemeBlack
Returns a semi-transparent dark blue for selection highlighting.
getSelectColor() - Method in class microui.core.style.theme.ThemeGlass
Returns a medium gray for selection highlighting.
getSelectColor() - Method in class microui.core.style.theme.ThemeGray
Returns a semi-transparent cyan for selection highlighting.
getSelectColor() - Method in class microui.core.style.theme.ThemeWhite
Returns a semi-transparent blue for selection highlighting.

Gets the selection highlight color.
getSelectionColor() - Method in class microui.component.TextField
Gets the selection highlight color.

getSelectionEffectiveEndRow() - Method in class microui.core.TextEditorModel

getSelectionEffectiveStartRow() - Method in class microui.core.TextEditorModel

Gets the selection end column.

getSelectionStartRow() - Method in class microui.core.TextEditorModel

Returns the shadow effect applied to this component.
getSpatialAnimator() - Method in class microui.core.base.SpatialView
Returns the spatial animator associated with this view.
getSpeed() - Method in class microui.core.effect.Hover
Returns the current animation speed.
getSpeed() - Method in class microui.core.style.AbstractLerpedColor
Returns the current animation speed.
getSpeed() - Method in class microui.util.Timer
Returns the current speed of the timer.
getSpeedForUpdate() - Method in class microui.core.controller.MultiLineTextController
Returns the current update speed (minimum milliseconds between history updates).
getStrokeColor() - Method in class microui.core.AbstractButton
Gets the stroke color (border color) of the button.
getStrokeColor() - Method in class microui.core.RangeControl
Gets the stroke color (border color) of the control.
getStrokeColor() - Method in class microui.core.style.theme.AbstractTheme
Returns the color for strokes/borders around UI elements.
getStrokeColor() - Method in class microui.core.style.theme.ThemeBlack
Returns pure black for strokes and borders.
getStrokeColor() - Method in class microui.core.style.theme.ThemeGlass
Returns a light blue-gray color for strokes with medium transparency.
getStrokeColor() - Method in class microui.core.style.theme.ThemeGray
Returns a medium gray for strokes and borders.
getStrokeColor() - Method in class microui.core.style.theme.ThemeWhite
Returns pure black for strokes and borders.
getStrokeWeight() - Method in class microui.core.AbstractButton
Gets the stroke weight (border thickness) of the button.
getStrokeWeight() - Method in class microui.core.RangeControl
Gets the stroke weight (border thickness) of the control.
getTabSize() - Method in class microui.component.TextArea
Gets the current tab size (number of spaces per tab).
getTarget() - Method in class microui.core.effect.AbstractShadow
Returns the target ContentView for this shadow.
getTargetSpatialView() - Method in class microui.core.effect.SpatialAnimator
Returns the target SpatialView being animated.
getText() - Method in class microui.component.Button
Gets the text currently displayed on the button.
getText() - Method in class microui.component.LabeledCheckBox
Gets the text displayed next to the checkbox.
getText() - Method in class microui.component.TextField
Gets the current text content.
getText() - Method in class microui.component.TextView
Gets the current text content.
getText() - Method in class microui.core.controller.MultiLineTextController
Returns the complete text content as a single string with newline separators.
getText() - Method in class microui.core.TextEditorModel
Gets the complete text content as a single string with line separators.
getText() - Method in class microui.feedback.TextTooltipContent
Returns the current text content.
getTextAfterCursor() - Method in class microui.core.TextEditorModel
Gets the text content from the current cursor position to the end.
getTextColor() - Method in class microui.component.Button
Gets the color of the button's text.
getTextColor() - Method in class microui.component.LabeledCheckBox
Gets the color of the label text.
getTextColor() - Method in class microui.component.TextArea
Gets the text color.
getTextColor() - Method in class microui.component.TextField
Gets the text color.
getTextColor() - Method in class microui.component.TextView
Gets the text color.
getTextColor() - Method in class microui.feedback.TextTooltipContent
Returns the text color of the tooltip.
getTextId() - Method in class microui.core.base.View
Returns the text identifier of the element.
getTextSize() - Method in class microui.component.TextArea
Gets the text size in pixels.
getTextSize() - Method in class microui.component.TextField
Gets the text size in pixels.
getTextSize() - Method in class microui.component.TextView
Gets the manual text size (used when auto-resize is disabled).
getTextSize() - Method in class microui.feedback.TextTooltipContent
Returns the current text size.
getTextUntilCursor() - Method in class microui.core.TextEditorModel
Gets the text content from the beginning up to the current cursor position.
getTextViewColor() - Method in class microui.core.style.theme.AbstractTheme
Returns the color for non-editable text elements (labels, headers, etc.).
getTextViewColor() - Method in class microui.core.style.theme.ThemeBlack
Returns the light gray color for non-editable text.
getTextViewColor() - Method in class microui.core.style.theme.ThemeGlass
Returns a near-white color with high opacity for text views.
getTextViewColor() - Method in class microui.core.style.theme.ThemeGray
Returns a very dark gray for text views.
getTextViewColor() - Method in class microui.core.style.theme.ThemeWhite
Returns pure black for non-editable text.
getTheme() - Static method in class microui.core.style.theme.ThemeManager
Returns the current theme being used by all UI components.
getThumbColor() - Method in class microui.component.Scroll
Gets the background color of the thumb.
getThumbHoverColor() - Method in class microui.component.Scroll
Gets the color of the hover effect on the thumb.
getThumbHoverSpeed() - Method in class microui.component.Scroll
Gets the animation speed of the hover effect on the thumb.
getThumbRipplesColor() - Method in class microui.component.Scroll
Gets the color of the ripple effects on the thumb.
getThumbStrokeColor() - Method in class microui.component.Scroll
Gets the stroke color (border color) of the thumb.
getThumbStrokeWeight() - Method in class microui.component.Scroll
Gets the stroke weight (border thickness) of the thumb.
getTooltipBackgroundColor() - Method in class microui.core.style.theme.AbstractTheme
Returns the background color for tooltip popups.
getTooltipBackgroundColor() - Method in class microui.core.style.theme.ThemeBlack
Returns an animated gradient for tooltip backgrounds.
getTooltipBackgroundColor() - Method in class microui.core.style.theme.ThemeGlass
Returns a light blue-gray for tooltip backgrounds.
getTooltipBackgroundColor() - Method in class microui.core.style.theme.ThemeGray
Returns a light gray for tooltip backgrounds.
getTooltipBackgroundColor() - Method in class microui.core.style.theme.ThemeWhite
Returns an animated gradient for tooltip backgrounds.
getTooltipContent() - Method in class microui.core.base.Component
Gets the current tooltip content.
getTooltipText() - Method in class microui.core.base.Component
Gets the text from the tooltip if it is a TextTooltipContent.
getTooltipTextColor() - Method in class microui.core.style.theme.AbstractTheme
Returns the text color for tooltip popups.
getTooltipTextColor() - Method in class microui.core.style.theme.ThemeBlack
Returns a complex animated gradient for tooltip text.
getTooltipTextColor() - Method in class microui.core.style.theme.ThemeGlass
Returns pure black for tooltip text.
getTooltipTextColor() - Method in class microui.core.style.theme.ThemeGray
Returns a dark gray for tooltip text.
getTooltipTextColor() - Method in class microui.core.style.theme.ThemeWhite
Returns a complex animated gradient for tooltip text.
getUndoStack() - Method in class microui.core.controller.MultiLineTextController
Returns a string representation of the undo stack for debugging.
getValidationMode() - Method in class microui.component.TextField
Gets the current validation mode for text input.
getValidationMode() - Method in class microui.core.controller.FullSingleLineTextController
Returns the current validation mode.
getValue() - Method in enum class microui.constants.AutoResizeMode
Gets the scaling factor divisor for this resize mode.
getValue() - Method in class microui.core.RangeControl
Gets the current value of the range control.
getVersion() - Static method in class microui.MicroUI
Returns the current version of the MicroUI library.
getWeight() - Method in class microui.core.style.Stroke
Returns the current stroke weight.
getWeight() - Method in class microui.layout.LinearAxisLayoutParams
Returns the weight of the component.
getWeightBottom() - Method in class microui.core.effect.AbstractShadow
Returns the bottom shadow weight (intensity).
getWeightLeft() - Method in class microui.core.effect.AbstractShadow
Returns the left shadow weight (intensity).
getWeightRight() - Method in class microui.core.effect.AbstractShadow
Returns the right shadow weight (intensity).
getWeightTop() - Method in class microui.core.effect.AbstractShadow
Returns the top shadow weight (intensity).
getWidth() - Method in class microui.core.base.SpatialView
Returns the width.
getX() - Method in class microui.core.base.SpatialView
Returns the x-coordinate.
getY() - Method in class microui.core.base.SpatialView
Returns the y-coordinate.
GraphicsBuffer - Class in microui.core
A container for managing off-screen graphics buffers with composable buffered views.
GraphicsBuffer() - Constructor for class microui.core.GraphicsBuffer
Constructs a GraphicsBuffer at position (0,0) with zero dimensions.
GraphicsBuffer(float, float, float, float) - Constructor for class microui.core.GraphicsBuffer
Constructs a GraphicsBuffer with specified position and dimensions.
GraphicsBuffer(SpatialView) - Constructor for class microui.core.GraphicsBuffer
Constructs a GraphicsBuffer with position and dimensions from a SpatialView.

Gray color 128 shades

GREEN - Static variable in class microui.core.style.Color

GridLayout - Class in microui.layout
Layout manager that arranges child components in a grid with specified columns and rows.
GridLayout(int, int) - Constructor for class microui.layout.GridLayout
Constructs a GridLayout with specified columns and rows.
GridLayoutParams - Class in microui.layout
Layout parameters for positioning components within a GridLayout.
GridLayoutParams(int, int) - Constructor for class microui.layout.GridLayoutParams
Constructs GridLayoutParams for a single cell with default center alignment.
GridLayoutParams(int, int, int, int) - Constructor for class microui.layout.GridLayoutParams
Constructs GridLayoutParams with default center alignment.
GridLayoutParams(int, int, int, int, int, int) - Constructor for class microui.layout.GridLayoutParams
Constructs GridLayoutParams with all parameters specified.
